<!--
Thanks for contributing to Niya Labs. Fill in the sections below — short
bullets are fine. PRs that ignore this template may be held while we ask
the same questions by hand.
-->

## Summary

_What does this PR change, and why?_

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infra / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is roughly ≤ 300 lines of diff (split larger changes into follow-ups)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (root) + `cd extension && npm run build` if extension is touched
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the unreleased section (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Screenshots attached for any UI change
- [ ] No secrets, real wallet addresses, or personal info in the diff
- [ ] If a new `NEXT_PUBLIC_*` variable is added, it is genuinely public-safe (not an API key)

## Screenshots / recordings (UI changes only)

_Drag images or videos here._

## Testing

_How did you verify this works? Include steps a reviewer can repeat locally._

## Related issues

_Closes #…_
